name: rp2040_internal_temp_mailbox_s3jtag
notes: No-wire RP2040 internal temperature self-test for the S3JTAG bench. The DUT reads the internal temperature ADC channel and reports PASS/FAIL through the AEL mailbox. No TARGETIN or UART wiring is required.

bench_setup.notes: No-wire RP2040 Stage 1 self-test. Requires only SWDIO, SWCLK, and GND. No UART, TARGETIN, or local loopback jumper is required.

peripheral_signals.notes: Internal RP2040 temperature sensor path read through the ADC peripheral.
Visual only. Toggles after mailbox PASS/FAIL is written.
